title: dischidia bengalensis var. spathulata
intro: Dischidia bengalensis var. spathulata, commonly known as the String of Nickels or String of Coins, is a rare and unique epiphytic plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The therapeutic actions of Dischidia bengalensis var. spathulata include its anti-hypertensive, anti-inflammatory, and anti-oxidative properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Dischidia bengalensis var. spathulata can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation or allergic reactions in individuals with sensitive skin, resulting in redness, itching, or rashes.
